description: Mahjong tile SVG assets for mahjong-solitaire.html

man.style: Red kanji numerals (一〜九) + 萬 label, serif font

pin.style: Blue circles (#2980b9) arranged in standard mahjong pattern, with white highlight rings

sou.style: 1s: traditional bird motif (green body + red belly + eye); 2s〜9s: green bamboo rods (#27ae60) in standard pattern

wind.description: Wind honor tiles: 東南西北

dragon.description: Dragon honor tiles: 中(red)・發(green)・白(border)
dragon.style: chun: red 中 (#c0392b); hatsu: green 發 (#27ae60); haku: empty bordered rect (traditional blank)

flower.description: Flower bonus tiles: 春・夏・秋・冬
flower.style: Floral symbol ✿ + season kanji: spring(red), summer(amber), autumn(orange), winter(blue)

season.description: Season bonus tiles: 梅・蘭・菊・竹
season.style: Decorative leaf symbol ❧ + plant kanji: plum(red), orchid(purple), chrysanthemum(amber), bamboo(green)

usage: mahjong-solitaire.html — tile face rendering via or CSS background-image
